'''Panther Flight''' was the designation for a [[Flight group/Legends|flight]] of [[YT-5100 Shriek-class bomber|YT-5100]] [[Bomber/Legends|bombers]] that fought in the [[Battle of Tralus (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Tralus]]. The unit included [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]], flying as [[Panther One]], and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], flying as [[Panther Two]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]''
